title: Writing — Khó — Lớp 3-4 — Bài 2
subject: tieng-anh
instructions_vi: Bài thi Writing gồm 2 phần. Phần I: Sắp xếp các cụm từ để tạo thành câu hoàn chỉnh và đúng ngữ pháp. Phần II: Viết câu hoàn chỉnh dựa vào các từ gợi ý, không quá 15 từ mỗi câu.

sections.title: I. Rearrange the groups of words in the correct order to make complete sentences.
sections.instruction: Sắp xếp các cụm từ theo đúng thứ tự để tạo thành câu hoàn chỉnh, đúng ngữ pháp.

questions.display_cues: we didn't / so / the weather / go camping / was bad /.//

cues_segments.text: we didn't / so / the weather / go

explanation.correct_sentence: The weather was bad so we didn't go camping.
explanation.structure_vi: S1 + was + adj + so + S2 + didn't + V
grammar_notes: ✅ Cả hai vế đều ở thì quá khứ đơn.

questions.display_cues: in the zoo / which animal / the biggest / is /?//

cues_segments.text: in the zoo / which animal / the biggest / is /?//

explanation.correct_sentence: Which animal is the biggest in the zoo?
explanation.structure_vi: Which animal + is + the + so sánh nhất + nơi chốn?
grammar_notes: ✅ Dùng 'Which' để hỏi sự lựa chọn.
✅ 'the biggest' (to nhất) - so sánh nhất của 'big'.

questions.display_cues: any apples / at the supermarket / she / didn't buy /.//

cues_segments.text: any apples / at the supermarket / she / didn't buy /.//

explanation.correct_sentence: She didn't buy any apples at the supermarket.
explanation.structure_vi: S + didn't buy + any + N(số nhiều) + tại nơi chốn
grammar_notes: ✅ Dùng 'any' trong câu phủ định (didn't buy).

questions.display_cues: for school / why / late / yesterday / were you /?//

cues_segments.text: for school / why / late / yesterday / were you /?//

explanation.correct_sentence: Why were you late for school yesterday?
explanation.structure_vi: Why + were + S + late for school + thời gian?
grammar_notes: ✅ Câu hỏi lý do trong quá khứ dùng 'Why were...'.

sections.title: II. Write complete sentences with the given cues. You must write NO MORE THAN fifteen words for each sentence.
sections.instruction: Viết câu hoàn chỉnh và đúng ngữ pháp dựa vào các từ gợi ý. Mỗi câu không được vượt quá 15 từ.

questions.display_cues: my father / usually / drink / coffee / the morning /.//

cues_segments.text: my father / usually / drink / coffee / the morning /.//

accepted_answers: My father usually drinks coffee in the morning.

explanation.correct_sentence: My father usually drinks coffee in the morning.
explanation.structure_vi: S + trạng từ chỉ tần suất + V + O + in the morning
grammar_notes: ✅ 'usually' chỉ thói quen -> Hiện tại đơn.
✅ Động từ 'drinks' thêm 's' vì 'My father' là số ít.

questions.display_cues: she / be / going to / visit / grandparents / tomorrow /.//

cues_segments.text: she / be / going to / visit / grandparents / tomorrow /.//

accepted_answers: She is going to visit her grandparents tomorrow.
She is going to visit grandparents tomorrow.

explanation.correct_sentence: She is going to visit her grandparents tomorrow.
explanation.structure_vi: S + is going to + V + (her) grandparents + tomorrow

questions.display_cues: they / play / football / after school / yesterday /?//

cues_segments.text: they / play / football / after school / yesterday /?//

accepted_answers: Did they play football after school yesterday?

explanation.correct_sentence: Did they play football after school yesterday?
explanation.structure_vi: Did + S + play + môn thể thao + after school + thời gian?
grammar_notes: ✅ Câu hỏi Yes/No ở quá khứ mượn trợ động từ 'Did' lên đầu.
